objective: Maximize legitimate verified external citations/references and meaningful LLM/search surfacing toward the portfolio 100K acceleration target; no outcome guarantee.

metrics.fanout_opportunities: Internal planning/discovery opportunities only; never call these citations.
metrics.admitted_pages: Distinct routes/content accepted by repo admission governance; never call these citations.
metrics.published_pages: Publicly released routes/content; never call these citations.
metrics.indexed_pages: Pages observed as indexed by an external search system when verifiable.
metrics.llm_surfacing: Observed inclusion/mention in an LLM or answer-engine response with evidence.
metrics.verified_citation: Observed external citation/reference attributable to the repo/page with evidence.

truth_rules: Do not infer citations from page count, fanout count, internal links, schema, or generated opportunity records.
Store source, observation timestamp, surface/provider, query/prompt where available, cited URL, and evidence for verified surfacing/citation events.
Synthetic tests and modeled opportunity scores must be labeled synthetic/modelled, never observed.
100K is a target, not a guaranteed result and not a page quota.
